item.title: Stand with any and all resistance against this g*nocidal empire, from Sudan to Gaza to Delaney hall
item.description:

item.title: If y’all don’t want me to point out the war crimes of the Democrats, you should stop lying about them because yes they wouldn’t ...
item.description:
If y’all don’t want me to point out the war crimes of the Democrats, you should stop lying about them because yes they wouldn’t be the same but the difference between them wouldn’t it be substantially saving lives, it would be lying about the lives they cost#greenscreenvideo final disclaimer: i voted for Harris, i lived in a state that had a 0 percent chance of flipping so my vote had literally 0 impact. Don’t get in my comments yapping about leftists not doing enough.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s almost like the ideologies come together when they support American imperialism

item.title: mhmmmm yes yes it’s totally the colony that is blackmailing its imperial core and totally not the ever increasing accumulation o...
item.description:
mhmmmm yes yes it’s totally the colony that is blackmailing its imperial core and totally not the ever increasing accumulation of capital and v**lent protection of that capital. Wow ur rly showing those Israeli billionaires by protecting and victimizing the American ones. Famously billionaires hate reactive nationalism.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: And yes Caleb hammer is consistently pandering to the right wing
item.description:
And yes Caleb hammer is consistently pandering to the right wing . I will take no apologia of the guy that openly lied about my criticism of him in front of 3 million ppl.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
